creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Mon Apr 21 07:52:16 2014
New Revision: 351668
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351668
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351668/

Log:
  devel/php-composer: update to 1.0.0-alpha8.20140419
  
  - upgrade to 1.0.0-alpha8.20140419.
  - add intl, openssl and phar dependencies.
  
  PR:		188796
  Submitted by:	    Gea-Suan Lin <gslin@gslin.org> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/php-composer/Makefile
  head/devel/php-composer/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/php-composer/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/php-composer/Makefile	Mon Apr 21 03:13:26 2014	(r351667)
+++ head/devel/php-composer/Makefile	Mon Apr 21 07:52:16 2014	(r351668)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	composer
-DISTVERSION=	1.0.0-alpha8.20140223
+DISTVERSION=	1.0.0-alpha8.20140419
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://getcomposer.org/download/${DISTVERSION}/ \
 		http://freebsd.cs.nctu.edu.tw/~gslin/files/${PORTNAME}/${DISTVERSION}/
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ LICENSE=	MIT
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 NO_WRKSUBDIR=	yes
-USE_PHP=	yes
+USE_PHP=	intl openssl phar
 
 PLIST_FILES=	bin/composer \
 		bin/composer.phar

Modified: head/devel/php-composer/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/php-composer/distinfo	Mon Apr 21 03:13:26 2014	(r351667)
+++ head/devel/php-composer/distinfo	Mon Apr 21 07:52:16 2014	(r351668)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (composer-1.0.0.a8.20140223/composer.phar) = 53bacb3afc3c14998ac4744dd34fd7d799af3ef169147da7772a60820679578b
-SIZE (composer-1.0.0.a8.20140223/composer.phar) = 998870
+SHA256 (composer-1.0.0.a8.20140419/composer.phar) = ca7adea8c7b62edc6cb4229bfd399ec2fdb46a3dfec389d0bd9270914089a17d
+SIZE (composer-1.0.0.a8.20140419/composer.phar) = 1012394
